name: libtext-iconv-perl
title: libtext-iconv-perl
summary: module to convert between character sets in Perl
description:
module to convert between character sets in Perl
The iconv() family of functions from XPG4 defines an API for converting
between character sets (e.g. UTF-8 to Latin1, EBCDIC to ASCII). They
are provided by libc6.
.
This package allows access to them from Perl via the Text::Iconv
package.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use libtext-iconv-perl because module to convert between character sets in Perl.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use libtext-iconv-perl as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair libtext-iconv-perl with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `libtext-iconv-perl --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
